requirement_topic.en: Pakistan Market Access — PSQCA Conformity/Marking, PTA Approval, Registered In-Country Importer (No EU AR/EPR/WEEE)
requirement_topic.zh: 巴基斯坦市场准入——PSQCA合格评定/标识、PTA核准、在地注册进口商（无欧盟AR/EPR/WEEE）
requirement_topic.zht: 巴基斯坦市場准入——PSQCA合格評定/標識、PTA核准、在地註冊進口商（無歐盟AR/EPR/WEEE）

summary.en: Foreign manufacturers cannot place lithium batteries or power banks on the Pakistani market directly; market access runs through an in-country registered importer who clears goods at Karachi or Port Qasim and is the responsible party for Pakistani regulators. The market-access stack is: (1) PSQCA conformity assessment and conformity marking where the product category is on PSQCA's mandatory Conformity Assessment list — the importer applies for the PSQCA licence/marking based on testing to the adopted PS/IEC standard; (2) PTA type approval where the product has wireless functions, obtained before import; (3) NEECA energy-efficiency labelling where the appliance category is regulated; (4) customs clearance under the Pakistan Customs / Federal Board of Revenue (FBR) regime, including the importer's NTN/sales-tax registration and any import authorisation. There is NO Pakistani equivalent of the EU Authorised Representative, no per-Member-State EPR battery registration, and no WEEE registration; the importer (not an appointed compliance representative) is the local accountable entity.
summary.zh: 外国制造商不能直接将锂电池或移动电源投放巴基斯坦市场；市场准入须经由在地注册进口商，由其在卡拉奇或卡西姆港清关，并作为对巴基斯坦监管机构的责任方。市场准入要件为：（1）当产品类别列入PSQCA强制合格评定目录时的PSQCA合格评定与合格标识——进口商依据按所采用PS/IEC标准的测试申请PSQCA许可/标识；（2）含无线功能时的PTA型号核准，须在进口前取得；（3）受管制电器类别下的NEECA能效标识；（4）在巴基斯坦海关/联邦税收局（FBR）制度下的清关，包括进口商的NTN/销售税注册及任何进口授权。巴基斯坦没有等同于欧盟授权代表的制度，没有按成员国的电池EPR注册，也没有WEEE注册；进口商（而非指定的合规代表）是本地问责实体。
summary.zht: 外國製造商不能直接將鋰電池或行動電源投放巴基斯坦市場；市場准入須經由在地註冊進口商，由其在卡拉奇或卡西姆港清關，並作為對巴基斯坦監管機構的責任方。市場准入要件為：（1）當產品類別列入PSQCA強制合格評定目錄時的PSQCA合格評定與合格標識——進口商依據按所採用PS/IEC標準的測試申請PSQCA許可/標識；（2）含無線功能時的PTA型號核准，須在進口前取得；（3）受管制電器類別下的NEECA能效標識；（4）在巴基斯坦海關/聯邦稅收局（FBR）制度下的清關，包括進口商的NTN/銷售稅註冊及任何進口授權。巴基斯坦沒有等同於歐盟授權代表的制度，沒有按成員國的電池EPR註冊，也沒有WEEE註冊；進口商（而非指定的合規代表）是本地問責實體。

standards_or_laws: PSQCA Act 1996 — mandatory conformity assessment / marking licence (importer-applied)
Pakistan Telecommunication (Re-organisation) Act 1996 — PTA type approval for wireless products
NEECA Act 2016 — energy-efficiency labelling for regulated appliance categories
Customs Act 1969 and FBR import procedures — in-country importer clearance at Karachi / Port Qasim (NTN / sales-tax registration)

summary.en: China's domestic market access uses CCC (China Compulsory Certification, administered by CNCA/SAMR), which is mandatory for certain rechargeable battery product categories sold domestically (e.g., mobile-phone lithium batteries are CCC-listed). CCC is a Chinese domestic requirement and is NOT recognised by Pakistan; it does not substitute for PSQCA conformity, PTA approval, or any Pakistani import requirement. For domestic Chinese sales there is no foreign-importer construct, no foreign authorised representative, and no foreign EPR registration. China's domestic waste-electronics handling is the WEEE-equivalent Regulations on the Administration of the Recovery and Disposal of Waste Electrical and Electronic Products, which applies only within China.
summary.zh: 中国国内市场准入采用CCC（中国强制认证，由CNCA/SAMR管理），对某些在国内销售的可充电电池产品类别为强制性（如手机锂电池已列入CCC目录）。CCC为中国国内要求，不被巴基斯坦认可，不可替代PSQCA合格评定、PTA核准或任何巴基斯坦进口要求。国内销售不涉及外国进口商构造、外国授权代表或外国EPR注册。中国国内废弃电子处理为WEEE对应的《废弃电器电子产品回收处理管理条例》，仅在中国境内适用。
summary.zht: 中國國內市場准入採用CCC（中國強制認證，由CNCA/SAMR管理），對某些在國內銷售的可充電電池產品類別為強制性（如手機鋰電池已列入CCC目錄）。CCC為中國國內要求，不被巴基斯坦認可，不可替代PSQCA合格評定、PTA核准或任何巴基斯坦進口要求。國內銷售不涉及外國進口商構造、外國授權代表或外國EPR註冊。中國國內廢棄電子處理為WEEE對應的《廢棄電器電子產品回收處理管理條例》，僅在中國境內適用。

standards_or_laws: CCC — China Compulsory Certification (CNCA/SAMR) — domestic China market access only; not recognised in Pakistan
PRC Regulations on the Administration of the Recovery and Disposal of Waste Electrical and Electronic Products (2011, amended 2019) — domestic WEEE equivalent

gap.en: Chinese exporters face a different and generally lighter market-access structure than the EU: (1) there is NO authorised-representative, EPR per-country, or WEEE registration burden in Pakistan; (2) instead the binding requirements are a registered in-country importer (the legal entity accountable to PSQCA/PTA/Customs), PSQCA conformity marking where the category is mandatorily listed, and PTA type approval for wireless products; (3) CCC certification does not transfer and cannot be presented to PSQCA. Practical gaps for the exporter: identifying and contracting a competent Pakistani importer, supplying IEC-format test evidence the importer can submit to PSQCA, obtaining PTA approval before shipment for any radio function, and confirming whether the specific battery/power-bank category is on PSQCA's current mandatory list (scope changes over time). Ports of entry are Karachi and Port Qasim.
gap.zh: 中国出口商面对的市场准入结构不同于欧盟且通常更轻：（1）巴基斯坦没有授权代表、按国EPR或WEEE注册负担；（2）约束性要求是已注册的在地进口商（对PSQCA/PTA/海关负责的法律实体）、类别被强制列入时的PSQCA合格标识，以及含无线功能产品的PTA型号核准；（3）CCC认证不可转移，也不能提交PSQCA。出口商的实际差距：识别并签约有能力的巴基斯坦进口商、提供进口商可向PSQCA提交的IEC格式测试证据、对任何无线功能在出货前取得PTA核准，并确认具体电池/移动电源类别是否列入PSQCA当前强制目录（适用范围随时间变化）。入境口岸为卡拉奇和卡西姆港。
gap.zht: 中國出口商面對的市場准入結構不同於歐盟且通常更輕：（1）巴基斯坦沒有授權代表、按國EPR或WEEE註冊負擔；（2）約束性要求是已註冊的在地進口商（對PSQCA/PTA/海關負責的法律實體）、類別被強制列入時的PSQCA合格標識，以及含無線功能產品的PTA型號核准；（3）CCC認證不可轉移，也不能提交PSQCA。出口商的實際差距：識別並簽約有能力的巴基斯坦進口商、提供進口商可向PSQCA提交的IEC格式測試證據、對任何無線功能在出貨前取得PTA核准，並確認具體電池/行動電源類別是否列入PSQCA當前強制目錄（適用範圍隨時間變化）。入境口岸為卡拉奇和卡西姆港。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory in part — a registered in-country importer and customs clearance are mandatory for all imports; PSQCA conformity marking is mandatory where the category is on PSQCA's list; PTA type approval is mandatory for wireless products. No authorised representative, battery EPR, or WEEE registration exists in Pakistan
mandatory_status.cn: CCC certification mandatory for domestically-sold products in applicable categories; no equivalent of a foreign importer, authorised representative, EPR per-country, or WEEE registration applies to Chinese exporters under Chinese law

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Pakistan market access for Chinese lithium batteries / power banks runs through a registered in-country importer plus PSQCA conformity marking where the category is mandatorily listed and PTA type approval for wireless products — there is no EU-style authorised representative, battery EPR, or WEEE registration. CCC certification does not transfer to or substitute for these Pakistan requirements. Exporters should contract a competent Pakistani importer, provide IEC-format test evidence for PSQCA, and secure PTA approval before shipment where wireless functions are present. Ports: Karachi and Port Qasim.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 中国锂电池/移动电源的巴基斯坦市场准入须经由已注册的在地进口商，并在类别被强制列入时取得PSQCA合格标识、对无线产品取得PTA型号核准——没有欧盟式的授权代表、电池EPR或WEEE注册。CCC认证无法转移或替代上述巴基斯坦要求。出口商应签约有能力的巴基斯坦进口商、为PSQCA提供IEC格式测试证据，并在含无线功能时于出货前取得PTA核准。口岸：卡拉奇和卡西姆港。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 中國鋰電池/行動電源的巴基斯坦市場准入須經由已註冊的在地進口商，並在類別被強制列入時取得PSQCA合格標識、對無線產品取得PTA型號核准——沒有歐盟式的授權代表、電池EPR或WEEE註冊。CCC認證無法轉移或替代上述巴基斯坦要求。出口商應簽約有能力的巴基斯坦進口商、為PSQCA提供IEC格式測試證據，並在含無線功能時於出貨前取得PTA核准。口岸：卡拉奇和卡西姆港。

source.publisher: Pakistan Standards and Quality Control Authority (PSQCA) — Conformity Assessment Centre
